title: Ocugen Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q3 2022 Earnings Call Summary. Business Highlights: Vaccine Programs: Completed enrollment in the Covaxin phase 2/3 immuno-bridging trial, with top-line data expected in early 2023. Licensed Washington University's mucosal vaccine (OCU500) for COVID-19 development in the US, Japan, and Europe. Gene Therapy Progress: Advanced OCU400 (retinitis pigmentosa treatment) to Cohort 3 enrollment, with plans to complete Cohort 3 enrollment by the end of the year. Announced OCU410ST for Stargardt disease alongside dry AMD development. Planned IND filings for both programs in Q2 2023. Cell Therapy: Expanded NeoCart (knee cartilage repair) pipeline; manufacturing facilities expected ready by end of 2023. Financial Position: Q3 2022 results showed net loss: $21.9 million ($0.10 per share). Cash position: $101.6 million. R&D expenses: $15.6 million (up from $6.3 million year-over-year). Management indicated cash runway into the fourth quarter of 2023 based on government support discussions.
